name: Sprint 1: Foundation
goal: Setup initial architecture and DB schemas.

name: Sprint 2: Authentication
goal: Implement user login, registration, and RBAC.

name: Sprint 3: User Dashboard
goal: Create the main dashboard UI and API endpoints.

name: Sprint 6: Comments & Activity
goal: Add commenting system on tasks and activity logs.

name: Sprint 7: Notifications
goal: Setup email and in-app notification system.

name: Sprint 8: Reporting V1
goal: Develop basic velocity and burndown charts.

name: Sprint 9: Integrations
goal: Integrate with third-party tools like Slack/GitHub.

name: Sprint 10: Search & Filter
goal: Add global search and advanced filtering for tasks.

name: Sprint 11: Performance Optimization
goal: Optimize slow database queries and frontend rendering.

name: Sprint 12: Mobile Responsiveness
goal: Ensure all views are fully functional on mobile devices.

name: Sprint 13: Admin Panel
goal: Build out the system administration and monitoring panel.

name: Sprint 14: User Testing & QA
goal: Address bugs from initial UAT phase.

name: Sprint 15: Launch Prep
goal: Final security audits and deployment preparation.
